findings.description: Two-column header layout collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: The top section of the PDF has a distinct right-hand column for 'Federal Employer ID Number' and a box for 'Fill in all applicable circles'. In the HTML, these elements are rendered sequentially below the left-hand address fields.
The vertical barcode located in the center of the PDF form on page 1 is rendered as a small, distorted horizontal graphic in the HTML.

findings.description: Two-column layout in signature block collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: The signature section at the bottom of the PDF features side-by-side areas for 'Signature of Managing Partner' and 'Signature of Preparer'. The HTML renders these elements sequentially in a single column format.

findings.description: Horizontal layout of sub-fields is lost.
findings.evidence: On line 8 of the Deductions from Income section, sub-fields 8a, 8b, 8c, and 8d are arranged horizontally across the page in the PDF. In the HTML, they are concatenated into a single text block within a single table cell.
